_**User**_

Explore the Next.js codebase at c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. App router structure - layout, homepage, existing pages (about, solutions, resources, contact)
2. Design system - CSS variables, fonts, colors, components, Tailwind setup

4. How images/assets are currently handled
5. Package.json dependencies (framer-motion, etc.)
6. Note the git status shows pages moved from app/(pages)/ to app/pages/ - check both if they exist and what's in them

Return: file paths of key files, summary of design tokens/branding, what already exists vs stubs, routing conventions (is app/pages/ correct for Next.js routes or wrong?), and any components we should reuse.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The terminal confirmed that /about, /solutions, /resources, and /contact all return 404 errors.

Moving pages from `app/(pages)/` to `app/pages/` broke routing. Route groups like `(pages)` strip from the URL path, but a standard `pages` folder does not. The files are also empty stubs, likely missing default exports and causing 404s.

Git history shows the old pages were deleted from `app/(pages)/` and recreated as empty stubs in `app/pages/`. The original route group folder is now missing entirely.

The homepage is still the default create-next-app boilerplate. It uses zinc, black, and white palettes instead of the brand design system. Framer-motion is absent from package.json. Navigation links to /about, /solutions, /resources, and /contact all 404.

Footer social icons render as plain Images without href links. The navigation hardcodes `/alic-logo.svg` instead of using the assets helper, while the footer correctly uses it. Geist fonts are loaded but IBM Plex is the primary sans; Geist serves as fallback. The public directory contains `vercel.svg`, `alic-logo.svg`, `linkedin.svg`, `twitter.svg`, `window.svg`, `youtube.svg`, and `facebook.svg`, yet `/next.svg` is missing from the homepage despite being referenced.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Confirmed `/about`–`/contact` 404 in the running dev server — `app/pages/` is breaking routes. Gathering a few final details for the report.

## Verdict

Brand shell is real (layout, nav, footer, tokens, logo/social assets). Homepage is still create-next-app boilerplate. About/Solutions/Resources/Contact are **empty stubs in the wrong folder** — nav links to `/about` etc. and the running dev server returns **404** for all of them. **`app/pages/` is incorrect** for those URLs; restore **`app/(pages)/`** (or put pages at `app/about/` etc.).

---

### 1. App Router structure

| Path | Role | Status |
|------|------|--------|
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\layout.tsx` | Root layout: fonts, `ResponsiveNav`, `{children}`, `SiteFooter` | Complete |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\page.tsx` | Homepage `/` | Boilerplate (Next.js starter) |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\globals.css` | Tokens + Tailwind `@theme` | Brand tokens defined |
| `app/pages/{about,solutions,resources,contact}/page.tsx` | Intended secondary pages | **Empty files** |
| `app/(pages)/...` | Previous correct location (route group) | **Missing on disk** (git shows deleted) |

No nested layouts, loading/error UI, or middleware.

Root layout wires the shared chrome and ALIC metadata:

```29:49:c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\layout.tsx
export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Atlanta Life Insurance Company",
  description: "ALIC Solutions",
};
// ...
      <body className="min-h-full flex flex-col font-sans text-alic-navy">
        <ResponsiveNav />
        {children}
        <SiteFooter />
      </body>
```

---

### 2. Routing: `app/pages/` vs `app/(pages)/`

**`app/pages/` is wrong for the URLs the nav expects.**

| Folder | URL for `about/page.tsx` | Why |
|--------|--------------------------|-----|
| `app/(pages)/about/page.tsx` | `/about` | `(pages)` is a **route group** — omitted from the URL |
| `app/about/page.tsx` | `/about` | Flat route |
| `app/pages/about/page.tsx` | `/pages/about` | `pages` is a **normal segment** |

Dev log confirms:

- `GET /` → 200  
- `GET /about`, `/solutions`, `/resources`, `/contact` → **404**

Nav already points at `/about`, `/solutions`, `/resources`, `/contact` — so those pages need to live under a route group or at `app/<slug>/`, not under `app/pages/`.

Also: current `app/pages/*/page.tsx` files are **empty** (no default export), so they would not be valid pages even at `/pages/about`.

---

### 3. Design system

**Defined in** `app\globals.css` via Tailwind v4 `@theme inline`:

| Token | Value | Tailwind usage |
|-------|-------|----------------|
| `--color-alic-navy` | `#101E45` | `text-alic-navy`, `bg-alic-navy/40` |
| `--color-alic-gold` | `#CFA540` | `text-alic-gold`, `bg-alic-gold` |
| `--color-alic-cream` | `#fffef9` | `bg-alic-cream` |
| `--color-alic-light` | `#f1f1f1` | (defined, unused so far) |
| `--background` / `--foreground` | cream / navy | `bg-background`, `bg-foreground` |
| `--font-sans` | IBM Plex Sans → Geist → sans | `font-sans` |
| `--font-serif` | Hedvig Letters Serif | `font-serif` (loaded, barely used yet) |
| `--font-mono` | Geist Mono | loaded |
| `--header-offset` | `5rem` | `.mobile-nav-panel` |

**Fonts** (from `next/font/google` in layout): Geist, Geist Mono, IBM Plex Sans (400/500/600), Hedvig Letters Serif (400). Body uses `font-sans` + navy text.

**Tailwind:** v4 via `@import "tailwindcss"` + `@tailwindcss/postcss` — no separate `tailwind.config.js`. Path alias `@/*` → project root.

---

### 4. Homepage & shared components

**Homepage** (`app\page.tsx`): still starter UI — zinc/black, `/next.svg`, Vercel deploy CTAs. Does **not** use ALIC tokens, `CtaButton`, or brand imagery.

**Reuse these:**

| Component | Path | Notes |
|-----------|------|--------|
| `ResponsiveNav` | `components\layout\ResponsiveNav.tsx` | Client; sticky header; logo; 4 links; mobile drawer; `CtaButton` |
| `SiteFooter` | `components\layout\SiteFooter.tsx` | Logo + © + social icons from `assets` |
| `CtaButton` | `components\shared\CtaButton.tsx` | Gold pill → `/contact`, default “Partner With Us →” |

CTA + nav targets:

```8:13:c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\layout\ResponsiveNav.tsx
const navItems = [
    { label: "About", href: "/about" },
    { label: "Solutions", href: "/solutions" },
    { label: "Resources", href: "/resources" },
    { label: "Contact", href: "/contact" },
] as const;
```

No other UI components. No motion library usage.

---

### 5. Images / assets

**Public SVGs:**

- Brand: `public\alic-logo.svg`
- Social: `facebook.svg`, `linkedin.svg`, `twitter.svg`, `youtube.svg`
- Starter leftovers: `next.svg`, `vercel.svg`, `file.svg`, `window.svg`

**Registry:** `lib\assets.tsx` — typed map for logo + social (src/alt/width/height). Footer uses it; nav still hardcodes `/alic-logo.svg`. Social icons are displayed but **not wrapped in links**.

Images via `next/image` only so far — no remote image config in `next.config.ts`.

---

### 6. Dependencies (`package.json`)

**Runtime:** `next@16.2.4`, `react@19.2.4`, `react-dom@19.2.4` only.

**Not installed:** framer-motion, animation libs, UI kits, CMS clients, icons packages.

**Dev:** Tailwind 4, PostCSS plugin, TypeScript, ESLint + `eslint-config-next`.

---

| Root layout + chrome | Done |
| Design tokens / fonts | Done |
| Nav, footer, CTA | Done |
| Asset map + logo/social SVGs | Done |
| Homepage | Starter stub (not branded) |
| About / Solutions / Resources / Contact | Empty + wrong path → 404 |
| Old `app/(pages)/` content | Deleted; not present on disk |
